content: PixiJS v8 is the best fit for Flowgrid visuals: official docs describe it as a high-performance 2D web rendering engine with WebGL and optional WebGPU renderers, scene graph, interaction support, filters, text, and touch/click handling. v8 uses a single pixi.js package and async Application.init, which should be wrapped behind a Flowgrid renderer adapter so simulation remains independent.
